_doc: Per-family row-count gate for the v18 build pipeline. Per tmpl_gen/templates/05132026/v18_plan.txt §3. v18 is a STANDALONE three-phase SFT (cf. v12) targeting CKT 77.6 and ATE 61.0. MCQ floor lifted from 5400 (v12) to 8100; ATE floor lifted from 9000 (v12) to 13500. All other axes carry v12 floors verbatim. The build halts before train/val split if any axis is below its reject_if_below value in the post-dedup corpus. shortname_patterns are exact matches OR prefix matches (trailing '*' = prefix match).

axes._note: v12 declared 10000 / floor 9000; v18 lifts to 13000 / floor 12500 to absorb AB.ATE.{9,10,11} + JS.ATE.{4,5,6} expansion (six new sub-templates). Substrate-capped: AB.ATE.7 (subtechnique-of edges = 477), AB.ATE.11 (intrusion-set narratives with description >100 chars = 185 anchors), and JS.ATE.{4,5,6} (Sigma/malware/group narrative variants) bound the achievable ATE row count to ~13K. Actual v18 build produced 12,978 rows -- a +30% lift over the v12 ~10,000-row baseline.

v12 declared 6000 / floor 5400; v18 lifts to 9000 / floor 8100 to absorb AB.MCQ.{1,2,5} count lift, AB.MCQ.{4,6} lift, AB.MCQ.EXT.{MITRE,SEC} +500 each, and the new AB.MCQ.EXT.GLOSS.1 generator (~1500 rows from CTI/sec public glossaries).
